contributor_note: Seeded from common horticultural knowledge. Needs primary source verification.

habit.note: Tropical vine needing warmth and humidity — will die back quickly in cold or dry air.

notes: Climbing vine from Southeast Asia. Leaves used fresh in cooking — peppery and aromatic. Prefers warmth and humidity with indirect light. Distinct from betel nut (Areca catechu). Common in Vietnamese and Thai cuisine.
